feed.title: P2WOTS: Live Signet & Interactive Wallet Demo

entry.title: P2WOTS: Live Signet & Interactive Wallet Demo
entry.summary:
The P2WOTS initiative marks a significant advancement in the development of post-quantum signatures for Bitcoin, highlighting its potential through comprehensive testing and community involvement. The proposal's main feature is its lightweight design, tailored to enhance Bitcoin's security against quantum threats. To demonstrate its effectiveness, an array of tests including 39 unit tests, 15 regression tests, and numerous on-chain signet tests have been conducted, all affirming the robustness and suitability of P2WOTS for future-proofing Bitcoin transactions.
For practical engagement and evaluation, a custom signet along with a wallet interface has been launched, allowing users to interactively test the proposal's functionalities. This demo is accessible online and is designed to be user-friendly to encourage widespread participation and feedback from the community. Interested individuals or parties can visit the official website [here](https://block_opuslux.ar.io) to create an account and commence testing.
Further technical details and updates are available on the project’s GitHub repository, which contains the latest codebase used in the signet. This repository serves as a resource for developers and enthusiasts who wish to conduct their own assessments or contribute to the ongoing development of the P2WOTS project. The repository can be accessed [here](https://github.com/opus-lux/bitcoin-proposal).
The project initiator encourages the community to explore this innovative proposal by engaging with the signet, reviewing the available data, and supporting its adoption through broader dissemination within the community. Such collective endorsement and experimentation are crucial for gauging the viability of P2WOTS and ensuring its integration into the mainstream Bitcoin protocol.
